steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Add the two equations to eliminate $3x$: $$2\cdot 4(8y)=32 \Rightarrow 8(8y)=32 \Rightarrow 8y=4.$$ Subtracting gives $10(3x)=0$, so $3x=0$.

steps.title: Find the value $3x + 8y$
steps.content: Therefore $3x+8y=0+4=4$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
